modules_at_risk.notes: Largest file at ~8000 lines. Mixes domain logic (InputState, Operator, execute_motion) with event loop I/O. Rc<RefCell<EditorState>> shared mutation makes unit testing difficult without a terminal. Has unit tests for pure sub-functions (convert_crossterm_key) but the handle_key_event function is hard to isolate.

~5200 lines. Registers closures that capture Rc<RefCell<EditorState>>. Each primitive is a closure registered at startup; substitution requires replacing the entire bridge registration. Tests exist in the runtime module but bridge functions are tested mostly via integration paths.

~3350 lines. EditorState has 40+ public fields making it a wide dependency surface. Any caller that borrows EditorState has implicit coupling to the entire state. Tests exist (unit tests in editor_state module) but full state construction is required for every test.
~1670 lines. Pure functions on Buffer/Rope. Well-tested. Ropey dependency is the only risk -- it is stable and widely used.
~1300 lines. Reads &EditorState and drives ratatui. Testable via ratatui's TestBackend (test seam exists). Tests present in module. Coupling to ratatui API is the main risk.
~1130 lines. All pure functions. Well-tested with unit tests. No I/O dependencies.
